titleStmt.title: SII 26.793: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 793. (A.R. No. 742 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulaśēkharadēva: Year 6, Makara (Tai) śu. 1, Saturday, Aviṭṭam = 1320 A.D., January 12.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records a tax-free daṉmadāṉa by ūravars of the three villages, viz. Mēlaik-Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi, Kīḻaik-Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi and Poygai in Mudiyakkuḍi-nāḍu, in Uṟattūrk-kūṟṟam in Kōṉāḍu alias Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻavaḷanāḍu, of the village Puṉattūr [alias] Vijeyaśrīkaranallūr belonging to the paṟṟu of the above-mentioned ūravars, to the two temples, viz., Tirumuttīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār and Poygaimalaiy-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.
The signatories were Vidi alias Varakkaṇḍa-vēḷāṉ of Koḍumbāḷūr the accountant of the nāḍu, Ōmandaṉ Iḷamaitaṭṭāṉ, the goldsmith of Kaḍuvaṅguḍi and another goldsmith (name lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu
makaranāyiṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nāḷ koṉāṭā
ṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu Uṟattūṟ kūṟṟattu mutiyakkuṭināṭṭu me
laikkaṭuvaṉkuṭi Ūravarum kiḻaikkaṭuvaṉkuṭi Ūravarum poykai Ūravarum Immuṉṟu Ūrava
romum Uṭaiyār tirumuttiśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār [ koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara] tevakaṉmi koyiṟ
kaṇakku śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum poykaimalaiyuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil
Ā(ā)ticaṇṭeśvaratevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakku śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷ
dhanmadāṉa pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ paṟṟāṉa puṉattūr vijeyaśrīkaranallūr kiḻpāṟke(l)
llai paṉṉāṅkompellaikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai � ṟippāḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟke[llai ṟipā]
ḻikku meṟkkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iḷaṅke vo kuṟucci ṭuva ku ku teṟ
kkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcaiyum mel ṉokkiya ma
raṅkaḷuṅ kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟukaḷuṅ kuḷamuṅ koppum maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭa prā
ptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa nāṅkaḷiṉṉāyaṉārukku tirukkaikamalarilutakam paṇṇiṉapaṭi
yile tirunāmattukkāṇiya paṇi
yum tirunāḷum celuttikkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭikoṇṭu Ikkuṭikkāṭu nāṉkellaiyum vanta cūlatā
paṉam paṇṇikkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu taṉmatāṉa I
ṟaiyilip piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumutticuramuṭaiyaṉāyaṉāṟkum poykaimalaināyiṉāṟkum (vi) koyilāticaṇṭecura
tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakku śrīmaheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku melaik kaṭuvaṉkuṭi Ūravaromum kiḻaikkaṭuvaṉkuṭi Ūravaromum poy
Iṉṉāṭṭavar colpaṭikku Iṉṉāṭṭukkaṇakku koṭumpāḷūrruṭaiyāṉ vitiyāṉa varakkaṇṭā m veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivom Iṉāṭṭu
kaṭuvaṉkuṭiyā(l)ṉ taṭṭāṉ Omantaṉ Iḷamaitaṭṭāṉ Eḻuttu meṟpaṭi
Digital edition of SII 26.793 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
